# Eventz

> Eventz is the hub of live events — a mobile-first platform to discover, host, and livestream events with a TikTok-style immersive feed.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Discover trending and nearby live events.
- [Events](/events): Browse all upcoming and ongoing events.
- [Live](/live): Watch events streaming right now.
- [Search](/search): Search events, organizers, and posts.
- [Support](/support): Help center and contact.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
